Tri-Source Frame Preview

Strict Doctrine:
  • Tri-Source Frame Preview only. 此頁只展示三條 source frame 的 review preview。
  • This is not Index.
  • This is not Hybrid. Hybrid reconciliation belongs to G37.
  • legal_conclusion = NOT_GENERATED. System does not generate legal conclusions.
  • No score / no index / no production frontend.
  • Missing fields remain UNKNOWN and do not imply legal conclusion.
    UNKNOWN、AMBIGUOUS_MATCH、FIELD_NOT_FOUND are distinct observation states.
    UNKNOWN、多重命中、欄位未找到是不同觀測狀態，不代表法律結論。
  • Preview does not compare API vs HTML.
  • Preview does not produce risk conclusion.
案號Case Number 來源層Source Layer 欄位/鍵值Field / Nested Key 欄位值Value 解析狀態Parse Status 驗證狀態Verification Status 法律狀態Legal Status 指稱類型Claim Type 上下文/路徑Context / Path 來源連結Source Ref
